description.p: DXF Sketcher is a practical 2D DXF editor focused on fast everyday sketch workflows.
It keeps parametric constraints and dimensions while also supporting direct object-style editing for quick operations.
It includes built-in helpers for boxes, gears, raster tracing, and fabrication-oriented edge features.

Release focused on workflow polish: project save/open support, multi-folder sketch browsing, clearer onboarding hints, improved light themes, and Linux release packaging in DEB, RPM, and AppImage formats.
Prerelease with self-contained Boxes integration, the new Edge Features workflow, raster tracing improvements, and release packaging updates.
